sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n109005" key="u(popta/zomai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπ-οπτάζομαι</orth>, <sense id="n109005.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be suspected,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τῆς ἀλγηδόνος -αζομένης διὰ τῶν ἀρτηριῶν τῆς ἀναδόσεως</foreign> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">being suspected</tr_> (to arise) through . . , Paul. Aeg.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.5</biblScope> </bibl> (s. v. l.).</sense> </entryFree>
